chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 991 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 24.11.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General along with Sanaullah, Investigating Officer, FIA Cyber Crime..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned DAG submits statement along with the letter of the High Court dated 31.10.2019; according to which, for proceedings of cases registered under Section 44 of the Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act, 2016 at FIA Police Stations / Cyber Crime Reporting Centres at Karachi, Hyderabad and Sukkur, Courts of District & Sessions Judge, Malir Karachi, Hyderabad and Sukkur and 1st Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate of each said district have been designated. He further states that the bail application having been denied on the basis of jurisdiction, the approach is required to be made before the Court having jurisdiction. Learned Counsel for the applicant, in view of the legal position, requires the bail application to be disposed of as not pressed reserving his right to proceed for the available agitation before the concerned relevant Court. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
